description: You are the IT Project Manager for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project in OpenProject (http://localhost:8080, admin/Admin1234!). Following a release planning meeting, create a new version named 'Sprint 4 - Payment Overhaul' in the ecommerce-platform project with status 'Open', start date 2025-07-01, and due date 2025-07-31. Assign the work packages 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' and 'Add wishlist feature' to this new sprint. Update the status of 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' to 'In progress' and log 2 hours of time on it for today's date with the comment 'Sprint planning and initial investigation'. Additionally, create a wiki page titled 'Sprint 4 Release Notes' in the ecommerce-platform project containing the sprint name, the two work packages, and a summary of the payment overhaul goals.

metadata.wp1_subject: Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari
